output: How to Use the how-to Skill.pdf
title: Build a Polished How-To PDF in Four Steps
intro: The how-to skill turns a folder of screenshots into a clean, uniform walkthrough PDF — a typeset cover, shadowed cards, slide numbers, optional step headers, and UI clean-up. Point it at your images, describe them in a small config, and run one command.

header.label: Gather your screenshots in one folder
Describe them in a guide.json config
Verify the output, then re-run after edits
